titleStmt.title: SII 39.80: original edition by K. Karuppiah
No. 80. (A.R. No. 80 of 1916.) TIRUKKĀḶAKKUḌI, TIRUPPATTUR TALUK, RAMNAD DISTRICT. KAKŌLANATHA TEMPLE-ON THE SAME WALL. KULAŚĒKHARA DĒVA-2ND YEAR.

summary.p: This inscription refers to an order of Gāngaiyaṉ, who issued to the temple authorities of Tirukkōḷakkuḍi recording the sale of the Kārāṇmai right of a land in Koṟṟamaṅgalam, a village near Iḷayātkakkuḍi in Kalvāyilnāḍu to a certain Nakularāya, besides the grant, consisting of several taxes like Antarāyam, Achchu, Veniyōgam, Karpuravilar, Kāriyavārāchi, Poṉvari, Siṟṟāyam Silvari, Veṭṭu7muṭṭiyāl, Echchōṟu, Kūṟṟarasi, etc., on the land to the temple are mentioned.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī kāṅkaiyaṉ Olai tirukkoḷakku
ṭit tāṉattāṟku poṉṉamarāvati veṭṭuvāṉ
poyyañciyāṉa nakularāyaṉukku nām kārāṇmaiyā
ka viṟṟa kuṭikāṭu kalvāyil nāṭṭu Iḷaiyāttakkuṭip
paṟṟil koṟṟamaṅkalattu perunāṉkellaikku Uṭ
paṭṭa nirnilamum naṉcey puṉceyyum nattamum toṭ
ṭamum kuḷamum kuḷapparippum meṉokkiya maramum kiṇo
kkiya kiṇaṟum maṟṟum Eppeṟppaṭṭiṉavum Ivaṉuk
ku kārāṇmaiyāka viṟṟu Ikkoṟṟamaṅkalattuk kaṭa
mai Antarāyam Accuvari viṉiokam karppūravilai kāriya
vārāṭci poṉvari ciṟṟāyam cilvari veṭṭimuṭṭi
Āḷ Eccoṟu kūṟṟarici maṟṟum Eppeṟppaṭṭaṉavum Uṭai
yār tirukkoḷakkuṭi Uṭaiya nāyaṉārkku kuṭutto
m Itu Ippiṭipāṭākak koṇṭu kulacekara tevaṟku yiraṇ
ṭāvatu mutal kaikkoṇṭu cantirātittavaṟ celva
tāka kalliluñ cempilum veṭṭik koṇṭu nāṉ kel
laiyum naṭuvuṭc cūlattāpaṉamum paṇṇikkoḷka I
vai kāṅkeya ṉeḻuttu Ippaṭikku Utaiya tivā
kara muventira veḷāṉeḻuttu §
Digital edition of SII 39.80 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
